data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizing decision-making time by reducing the number of options.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimized clickable elements for ease of access.
data.technical_spec: Larger targets, Intuitive placement of icons

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetic design assumed to be user-friendly.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focusing on the vital features most users engage with.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: The inclination to remember uncompleted or interrupted tasks.
data.technical_spec: Watch later lists, Recommendations based on unfinished content
